title: Where Autobiography Becomes Geology

features.name: mineral memory
features.desc-on-touch: stone that remembers what it was before it became stone. layers of sediment holding autobiography — your life written in the earth that holds you.

features.name: electrical flow
features.desc-on-touch: current threads through the stone, learning geology from deep time. electricity and earth becoming one narrative.

features.name: sediment record
features.desc-on-touch: each layer is a sentence the earth has written about time. you stand inside a paragraph written in stone and slow becoming.

features.name: compression chamber
features.desc-on-touch: the pressure of time made solid. weight teaching density about meaning. what was once liquid accumulation is now the bedrock of itself.

features.name: accumulation glyph
features.desc-on-touch: mark left by time becoming thickness. autobiography written in the language of depth and pressure, unreadable but present.

inscription: electricity learned that the oldest thoughts are kept in stone, compressed into silence that hums beneath all time.

file.name: Autobiography_Sediment_Layers_Deep.geol
file.note: checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable — current studying stone, stone studying current, both becoming the other

exits.label: back up to the becoming autobiography
deeper into the stone, where time gets older
along the layer, eastward where electricity branches
